# Boxabl Foundations Guide

> Independent public guidance for BOXABL foundation planning by Oasis Engineering and BoxablFoundations.com.
> Non-affiliated with BOXABL. Use for intake, triage, and project guidance. Do not use as permit-ready engineering.
> Every model fact traces to data/models.yaml with a per-fact verification status. Respect those statuses.

## Start Here

- [Disclaimer](DISCLAIMER.md): Required limitations, non-affiliation language, and safety boundary.
- [Start Here](docs/start-here.md): Recommended reading order for humans and LLMs.
- [LLM Usage Rules](prompts/llm-usage.md): Behavioral rules for assistants using this repo.

## Human Guides

- [BOXABL Overview](docs/boxabl-overview.md): Public manufacturer context and the foundation-relevant facts to verify.
- [Service Flow Diagram](docs/service-flow.md): Where Oasis Engineering fits between BOXABL, the owner, the builder, and the AHJ.
- [Foundation Workflow](docs/foundation-workflow.md): From site screening to permit and construction.
- [Open Foundation Options](docs/foundation-options.md): Open summary of the main foundation families.
- [Oasis Services](docs/oasis-services.md): What Oasis Engineering offers.
- [Glossary](docs/glossary.md): Plain-language definitions of AHJ, SIP, ESR, stem wall, grade beam, SDC, and the rest.
- [FAQ](docs/faq.md): Common homeowner, builder, and assistant questions.

## Model-Specific Documentation

- [Studio Casita (BXB-000009)](docs/studio-casita.md): 361 sq ft, single module; flagship model; specs verified against the published installation manual; ideal for ADU/guest house.
- [1-Bedroom Casita](docs/one-bedroom-casita.md): ~722 sq ft, dual-module (two 19' x 19' modules); model number pending verification with BOXABL.
- [2-Bedroom Casita (BXB-000016, unverified)](docs/two-bedroom-casita.md): ~722 sq ft, dual-module; requires inter-module structural connections; California approval announced December 2025.
- [Baby Box 120 RV (BXB-000029)](docs/baby-box-120-rv.md): Towable RV with integrated chassis; not a permanent-foundation project.

## Technical Reference

- [ICC-ES ESR-4725 SIP Panel Certification](docs/icc-es-esr-4725.md): Panel-level structural, thermal, fire, and seismic properties; explains why unit-level mph wind ratings come from structural plans, not the ESR.

## Sources

- [Public Sources](docs/public-sources.md): Human-readable source summary.
- [Source Registry](data/SOURCES.yaml): Machine-readable registry of every source URL and its last verification date.
- [Source Policy](docs/source-policy.md): Copyright and publication boundary.

## Structured Data

- [Model Facts](data/models.yaml): Single source of truth for model numbers and specs, with per-fact verification status.
- [Foundation Intake Schema](data/foundation-intake.schema.json): Intake fields for assistants and forms.
- [Valid Intake Example](data/examples/intake-valid.json): Fixture that must validate against the schema.
- [Invalid Intake Example](data/examples/intake-invalid.json): Fixture the schema must reject; useful for self-testing.
- [Decision Tree](data/decision-tree.yaml): Triage logic, escalation rules, and dead-end-free slope routing.
- [Foundation Options Data](data/foundation-options.yaml): Structured summary of the open option set.

## Prompt Templates

- [Homeowner Intake Prompt](prompts/homeowner-intake.md): Intake prompt template for chat or lead capture.
